---
title: "MLE Interview Prep"
subtitle: "ML coding & problem-solving notes for machine-learning engineer interviews."
toc: false
---

A collection of from-scratch implementations and notes covering the math,
classical ML, deep learning, modern architectures, and production topics that
commonly come up in machine-learning engineer interviews. Each page is a
self-contained, runnable notebook.

**Notion**

We use the following conventions when derving the mathematical expressions in these notes:

- scalars are denoted with lowercase letters (e.g., $x$)
- column vectors are denoted with lowercase bold letters (e.g., $\bf x$)
- matrices are denoted with uppercase bold letters (e.g., $\bf X$)
- Jacobian matrix such as $\frac{d \bf y}{d \bf x}$ is in denominator layout. That means, if $\bf y$ is a $m \times 1$ vector and $\bf x$ is a $n \times 1$ vector, then the Jacobian matrix will be a $n \times m$ matrix. The input $\bf x$ determines the rows in the derivative, and the output $\bf y$ determines the columns in the derivative. 

## Foundations

- [Matrix Calculus](ml-coding/foundations/matrix_calculus.qmd) — derivatives, layouts, and the shapes of gradients

## Classical ML

- [Linear Regression](ml-coding/classical-ml/linear-regression.ipynb)
- [Logistic Regression](ml-coding/classical-ml/logistic-regression.ipynb)
- [Softmax Regression](ml-coding/classical-ml/softmax-regression.ipynb)
- [K-Nearest Neighbors](ml-coding/classical-ml/knn.ipynb)
- [Decision Tree](ml-coding/classical-ml/decision-tree.ipynb)
- [K-Means](ml-coding/classical-ml/kmeans.ipynb)
- [Principal Component Analysis](ml-coding/classical-ml/principal-component-analysis.ipynb)
- [Naive Bayes](ml-coding/classical-ml/naive-bayes.ipynb)
- [Gaussian Mixture Models](ml-coding/classical-ml/gaussian-mixture.ipynb)

## Deep Learning

- [Artificial Neural Networks](ml-coding/deep-learning/ann.ipynb)
- [Convolution](ml-coding/deep-learning/convolution.ipynb)
- [Basic Modules](ml-coding/deep-learning/deep-learning-basic.ipynb)
- [Sampling Methods](ml-coding/deep-learning/sampling.ipynb)
- [Loss Functions](ml-coding/deep-learning/loss-function.ipynb)
- [Optimizers](ml-coding/deep-learning/optimizer.ipynb)
- [Training Loops](ml-coding/deep-learning/training.ipynb)

## Reinforcement Learning
- [Reinforcement Learning](ml-coding/reinforcement-learning/reinforcement-learning.ipynb)

## LLMs
- [Transformer](ml-coding/llms/transformer.ipynb)
- [LLaMA](ml-coding/llms/llama.ipynb)

## Generative Models
- [Diffusion & Flow Matching](ml-coding/generative-models/diffusion.ipynb)
- [VQ-VAE](ml-coding/generative-models/vq-vae.ipynb)

## Applied ML
- [Ensemble Learning](ml-coding/applied-ml/ensembling.ipynb)
- [Deployment Basics](ml-coding/applied-ml/deployment-basics.ipynb)
- [Distributed Training Pipeline](ml-coding/applied-ml/distributed-training-pipeline.ipynb)

## AD/Robotics
- [Metrics](ml-coding/ad-robotics/metrics.ipynb)
